title: ficus sansibarica subsp. macrosperma
intro: Ficus sansibarica subsp. macrosperma, also known as the Madagascar banyan, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The medicinal properties of Ficus sansibarica subsp. macrosperma include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Ficus sansibarica subsp. macrosperma can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
